subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose grasp are held the reins of the world! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name, through which the ocean surgeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی سبحانک یا من فی قبضتک زمام العالم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به ماج بحر
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
